case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS. ZHI CHAN LI

docket_entries.description: REMARK: FILE IS DESTROYED PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153. ORDER SIGNED AND FILED ON 10/14/2025.
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,072.97 FILED BY CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO AS TO DEFENDANT LI, ZHI CHAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-08-2011 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE OF CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAY-09-2011 BY PERSONAL SERVICE ON ZHI CHAN LI
DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE OF CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO AS TO DEFENDANT LI, ZHI CHAN CLAIM HEARING OF JUN-08-2011 OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL FILED
